description: User successfully completes registration (email/password or triggers email verification flow)
User successfully authenticates and session is established
User clicks an OAuth provider button (GitHub, Google, Hugging Face) on login or register
MFA challenge is triggered after password login — captures method and whether passkey is available
User views the public pricing page — top of the conversion funnel
User successfully launches a GPU compute instance (captures GPU model, tier, pricing mode, region)
User successfully deploys a serverless inference endpoint via Deploy Studio
User claims the $10 CAD free signup credits from the billing page
User opens the deposit modal to add credits to their wallet (Stripe top-up flow starts)
User saves auto-reload settings (captures enabled state, amount, and threshold)
User successfully adds a new credit/debit card via Stripe SetupIntent
